text: Found 7 Java source files in sg-evals/kafka--0753c489 containing @Deprecated annotations on producer/streams configuration or exception handling APIs. (1) StreamsConfig.java contains 5 deprecated config constants: DUMMY_THREAD_INDEX (deprecated, unused internal constant); CACHE_MAX_BYTES_BUFFERING_CONFIG (deprecated since 3.4, replaced by STATESTORE_CACHE_MAX_BYTES_CONFIG); DEFAULT_DESERIALIZATION_EXCEPTION_HANDLER_CLASS_CONFIG (deprecated since 4.0, replaced by DESERIALIZATION_EXCEPTION_HANDLER_CLASS_CONFIG); DEFAULT_PRODUCTION_EXCEPTION_HANDLER_CLASS_CONFIG (deprecated since 4.0, replaced by PRODUCTION_EXCEPTION_HANDLER_CLASS_CONFIG); DEFAULT_DSL_STORE_CONFIG (deprecated since 3.7, replaced by DSL_STORE_SUPPLIERS_CLASS_CONFIG). (2) ProductionExceptionHandler.java has 2 deprecated default methods: handle(ProducerRecord, Exception) deprecated since 3.9 in favor of handle(ErrorHandlerContext, ProducerRecord, Exception), and handleSerializationException(ProducerRecord, Exception) deprecated since 3.9 in favor of handleSerializationException(ErrorHandlerContext, ProducerRecord, Exception, SerializationExceptionOrigin). (3) DefaultProductionExceptionHandler.java has 1 deprecated override: handle(ProducerRecord, Exception) deprecated since 3.9. (4) DeserializationExceptionHandler.java has 1 deprecated default method: handle(ProcessorContext, ConsumerRecord, Exception) deprecated since 3.9 in favor of handle(ErrorHandlerContext, ConsumerRecord, Exception). (5) LogAndFailExceptionHandler.java and LogAndContinueExceptionHandler.java each have 1 deprecated override: handle(ProcessorContext, ConsumerRecord, Exception) deprecated since 3.9. (6) TopicConfig.java has 1 deprecated config: MESSAGE_DOWNCONVERSION_ENABLE_CONFIG deprecated since 4.0 as down-conversion is no longer possible in Kafka 4.0+, scheduled for removal in 5.0. Note: ProducerConfig.java contains zero @Deprecated annotations in this Kafka 4.x snapshot -- the old deprecated producer configs (block.on.buffer.full, metadata.fetch.timeout.ms) were fully removed prior to this version.

_metadata.notes: REDESIGNED from original task which searched for removed deprecated producer configs (block.on.buffer.full, metadata.fetch.timeout.ms). Those configs were fully removed from Kafka 4.x. This redesigned task instead catalogs @Deprecated annotations that actually exist in the pinned Kafka 4.x snapshot.
